title: Building QuickFolio: Architecture & Decisions
summary: A detailed breakdown of how QuickFolio is structured end-to-end: routing, content modeling, components, styling conventions, and the performance decisions that keep it fast while staying easy to extend.

title: Notion CMS Pipeline (Without Bloat)
summary: How to build a clean Notion-backed pipeline that publishes reliably, avoids slow pages, keeps previews accurate, and stays simple enough to maintain without turning into a full platform rewrite.

title: Rebuilding CoogPlanner for Speed: From Monolith to Serverless
summary: What changed when CoogPlanner moved to a serverless architecture: caching strategy, data access patterns, auth decisions, and how the UI stayed responsive even as the features grew.

title: Designing Case Studies That Actually Convert
summary: A practical framework for writing case studies that feel real: scoping, screenshots, metrics, before/after structure, and how to communicate results without sounding like marketing fluff.

title: A Simple Tailwind System for Consistent UI
summary: How to define spacing, type scale, borders, and surface tokens so every section feels coherent—without fighting Tailwind or creating an unreadable pile of utility classes.

title: SEO for Dev Portfolios: The Stuff That Actually Matters
summary: A no-nonsense checklist for dev portfolios: clean URLs, metadata, OG images, internal linking, sitemap hygiene, and how to write pages that rank without turning into a blog farm.
